LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT POY SIM GIN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT AS TO DEFENDANT'S GOOD FAITH IN SERVING THE NOTICE AND WITH RESPECT TO THE INTENT TO HAVE THE SON MOVE IN. DEFENDANT ALSO FAILED TO COMPLY WITH C.C.P. SECTION 1008 IN SEEKING SUMMARY ADJUDCIATION FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR FEES IS DENIED FOR LACK OF AUTHORITY TO AWARD FEES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Jonathan Joiner, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Leslie Zwemer
David Semel, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Poy Sim Gin

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Leslie Zwemer's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories (set #1, 2, 3) is denied in part and granted in part. The motion is granted as to interrogatories: 185, 396, 399, 402, 406 - 409. The motion is denied as to the remaining interrogatories. Compliance date of March 18, 2008. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Documents And Request For Sanctions; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Poy Gin's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted in part and denied in part.
Form interrogatories
2.13
denied
4.1, 6.3, 6.4
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further.
6.5
Granted in part. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to subpart (e)
9.1, 10.1, 11.2, 12.1, 12.2, 12.6, 50.1
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further.
Request for production of documents
Granted. The objections, other than those based on the attorney client or attorney work product privileges are overruled and stricken. Any documents withheld shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log.
Further responses shall be served within 15 days of notice of this order. A privilege log shall be served within 15 days of notice of this order. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
